module.name: stackedbar
module.description: Horizontal stacked bars for comparing composition: each line "Label | v1 v2 v3", segments coloured per series with a legend from the "series" param. Optional 100% normalization.
module.aiSpec:
STACKED horizontal BARS — compare how a total is composed across categories. Block module: one bar per line (all body sections are merged): `Label | 30 45 25` (segment values in series order, separated by spaces or commas). Use @barchart for single-value bars, or @chartjs for a full chart; @stackedbar is specifically for part-of-whole composition.
Parameters: `series` — segment names for the legend, comma-separated (e.g. "iOS, Android, Web"; default none). `normalize` — true | false (default false): stretch every bar to 100% (composition-only view). `unit` — suffix appended to printed values (e.g. "%" or "M"; default none). `height` — bar height in px, 10–80 (default 30). `showvalues` — true | false (default true): print each segment's value inside it when it fits. `colors` — comma-separated colour override for the segment palette (default built-in palette).
Example: <!-- @stackedbar series: "iOS, Android, Web", normalize: true, height: 26, colors: "#0ea5e9, #22c55e, #eab308" --> 2023 | 30 45 25 2024 | 35 40 25 <!-- @end -->

param.name: series
param.label: Series names
param.desc: Legend labels, comma-separated, in segment order.

param.name: normalize
param.label: Normalize to 100%
param.desc: Stretch every bar to 100% for a composition-only view.

param.name: unit
param.label: Value suffix
param.desc: Suffix appended to printed values, e.g. % or M.

param.name: showvalues
param.label: Show values
param.desc: Print each segment's value inside it when it fits.

snippet.label: Stacked bars
snippet.description: Composition bars; "Label | v1 v2 v3" per line, legend via series.
